title: UNION operator malfunctions in LEFT JOIN on view
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1(c1 TEXT NOT NULL, c2 DOUBLE DEFAULT 0.0);
CREATE VIEW v1 AS SELECT c1, CAST(c2 AS INTEGER) AS c2_int FROM t1;
SELECT * FROM t1 LEFT JOIN v1 ON v1.c2_int >= 1 WHERE TRUE UNION SELECT 'fallback', 0 WHERE FALSE;
INSERT INTO t1(c1, c2) VALUES (NULL, NULL);
key_bug_features: UNION operator in LEFT JOIN on view fails
